multiResults.label: Border Collie + Pug — Wizard
multiResults.prompt:
Use the exact pets shown across the source images. Create a single canvas portrait featuring all 2 pets together, each rendered with their own breed, markings, eye colour, and unique features preserved exactly as in the source photos. Do not merge them into hybrids. Do not change any of their breeds. The source images are authoritative.

Pet 1 (named "Scout"): a Border Collie, Black and white bicolor with symmetric markings: white blaze running from forehead down muzzle, white chest and front, black body and ears, Dark brown to black (image is black and white, limiting color determination) eyes, Classic Border Collie white facial blaze and intelligent alert expression.
Pet 2 (named "Otis"): a Pug, fawn/tan body with black mask covering entire face, muzzle, and eye area; markings appear symmetric, dark brown eyes, characteristic black mask with deep facial wrinkles and flat brachycephalic muzzle.

Apply this artistic transformation: wise wizards in star-embroidered indigo robes and pointed hats, glowing wooden staffs, magical library backdrop.

Render the names "Scout" and "Otis" in elegant clean serif typography along the lower margin of the canvas, each name beneath its respective pet, readable, no spelling errors, no other text on the canvas.

Output: vertical 4:5 canvas composition, painterly cinematic finish, premium polish for framed wall art.
